title: void — Architecture (SSOT)
summary: Grid-first terminal — a hard fork of Ghostty where an N×M pane grid is a first-class rendering surface. Zig shared core, native Swift (macOS) / GTK (Linux).
serve: python3 serve.py  (로컬 서버 + 브라우저 자동 오픈; file:// fetch 차단 우회)

tree.name: void
tree.role: grid-first terminal — hard fork of ghostty-org/ghostty
tree.detail: Grid-first terminal: an N×M pane grid is a first-class rendering surface. Zig shared core, native Swift (macOS) / GTK (Linux). Beta: grid mode only.

children.name: overview
children.detail: 프로젝트 한줄 요약 (원 summary 전문 · 사실 단위 분할)

children.name: concept
children.detail: Grid-first terminal — a hard fork of Ghostty where an N×M pane grid is a first-class rendering surface (not a window-manager bolt-on, not a tmux-style multiplexer).

children.name: auto-rebalance
children.detail: On cell-count change the layout auto-rebalances (cols = ⌈√N⌉, rows = ⌈N/cols⌉, cols ≥ rows); each cell carries its own cwd/env; input can broadcast to all cells.

children.name: inherits
children.detail: Inherits Ghostty's engine (SIMD parser, Metal/OpenGL, per-terminal threads) unchanged.

children.name: stack
children.detail: Zig shared core, native Swift on macOS, GTK on Linux.

children.name: status
children.detail: Beta: grid mode only.

children.name: meta
children.detail: 메타 (원 meta 객체)

children.name: ssot
children.detail: github.com/dancinlab/void (`hx install void`)

children.detail: hexa-lang · anima · nexus · n6 (canon)

children.detail: ghostty-org/ghostty (hard fork @ 964c9e32e — 4698 files renamed Ghostty → Void; upstream history + contributor credit preserved, cherry-pick-only syncs)

children.name: guard_baseline
children.detail: 릴리스 가드 베이스라인 (#19 unit tests · #23 release build)

children.name: tests
children.detail: VoidTests target — SessionManifestReclaimTests 7/7 · SessionManifestTriageTests 10/10 PASS (Xcode 26.5, `** TEST SUCCEEDED **`, #19).

children.name: build
children.detail: `zig build` VoidKit → `xcodebuild` Release Void.app build verified in release-fork CI (dispatch run, all steps success, 59M artifact, #23).

children.name: migrated_from
children.detail: VOID.md + VOID.log.md (domain doc pair) retired 2026-06-18 → ARCHITECTURE.json tree SSOT + ARCHITECTURE.html viewer (hexa-codex #161 / anima pattern; c4 standard). VOID.log.md folded into CHANGELOG.md.

children.name: doc-note
children.detail: 문서 규약 (원 note)

children.name: ssot-rule
children.detail: This JSON tree is the architecture SSOT (update-in-place, NOT append-only). Human viewer = ARCHITECTURE.html via `python3 serve.py`.

children.name: pointers
children.detail: History/decisions → CHANGELOG.md; governance → CLAUDE.md (→ project.tape) + the policy tape/md pairs. This doc points only, never duplicates rule thresholds.

children.name: policy-pairs-core
children.detail: Policy tape/md pairs: AI_POLICY · HACKING · PACKAGING · VOID_FORK

children.name: policy-pairs-more
children.detail: Policy tape/md pairs (cont.): LATTICE_POLICY · LIMIT_BREAKTHROUGH · TAPE-AUDIT

children.name: GOVERNANCE — the one rule that defines void
children.detail: SSOT mirror of the @D directive in CLAUDE.md (→ project.tape). The grid topology contract is the load-bearing invariant; thresholds live in project.tape, this doc only points.

children.name: @D grid_auto_layout — N×M grid topology auto-rebalance
children.detail: DO: grid auto-layout preserves cols = ⌈√N⌉, rows = ⌈N/cols⌉, cols ≥ rows; per-cell cwd isolation. DONT: break grid topology on cell-count change · add manual resize handles / splits (auto-only). — path: project.tape

children.name: Grid mode — first-class N×M tiling surface (macOS Swift app)
children.detail: The headline divergence from Ghostty: an N×M pane grid as a new renderer path, not a patch on the single-surface renderer and not a multiplexer process. Per-cell cwd/env, shared input routing, broadcast. Implemented in the native Swift macOS app. — path: macos/Sources/

children.name: keybindings
children.detail: cmd+g toggles grid <-> tab mode; cmd+ctrl+1..9 spawns into a slot (auto-rebalance); cmd+ctrl+0 broadcasts to all cells.

children.name: Splits / grid layout engine
children.detail: Split-tree + view that realize the N×M tiling and auto-rebalance geometry. — path: macos/Sources/Features/Splits/ (SplitTree.swift · SplitView.swift · TerminalSplitTreeView.swift)

children.name: Terminal controllers
children.detail: Per-window / per-surface controllers driving the grid + tab modes. — path: macos/Sources/Features/Terminal/ (TerminalController.swift · BaseTerminalController.swift · TerminalWindow.swift)

children.name: Surface views (per-cell)
children.detail: Each grid cell's SwiftUI/AppKit surface view, cwd/env-isolated. — path: macos/Sources/Void/Surface View/ (SurfaceView.swift + AppKit/UIKit variants)

children.name: Grid self-test
children.detail: Built-in grid topology / visual-order self-test harness. — path: macos/Sources/App/macOS/GridSelfTest.swift · macos/standalone-tests/GridVisualOrderTests.swift

children.name: Session persistence & restore
children.detail: mmap persist-ring-backed session continuity. — path: macos/Sources/App/macOS/ · macos/standalone-tests/

children.name: normal restart
children.detail: On a normal restart it operates with no false alarm (topology-lost notification gated behind didRestoreAnyWindow — a normal no-restore is no longer mis-reported, #16).

children.name: ring reclaim
children.detail: A closed cell's ring is reclaimed immediately (ringsToReclaim — orphan-ring leak blocked, session-scoped, quit/restart preserved, #17).

children.name: tests restored
children.detail: VoidTests target restored on Xcode 26.5 (#19): SessionManifestReclaimTests 7/7 + SessionManifestTriageTests 10/10 PASS.

children.name: note
children.detail: session-restore: 정상 재시작 topology-lost 오경보 제거 + closed-surface ring 누수 차단 (#16·#17·#18); VoidTests 타깃 Xcode 26.5 빌드 복구 — unit test 7개 실행 (#19). Both VOID.md milestones complete.

children.name: Inherited Ghostty engine (Zig shared core)
children.detail: Performance inherited, not rebuilt. The SIMD VT parser, Metal (macOS) / OpenGL (Linux) renderers, and per-terminal render/read/write threads come straight from Ghostty unchanged. Zig is the shared core; the apprt layer adapts it to each platform front-end. — path: src/

children.name: Terminal / VT core
children.detail: Terminal emulation, screen model, SIMD parser, unicode. — path: src/terminal/ · src/simd/ · src/unicode/

children.name: Renderer (Metal · OpenGL)
children.detail: GPU rendering backends; per-terminal render thread. — path: src/renderer/ (Metal.zig · opengl/ · backend.zig · cell.zig)

children.name: App runtime (apprt)
children.detail: Platform adapter: embedded (macOS C-ABI), GTK (Linux), none/browser/wasm. — path: src/apprt/ (embedded.zig · gtk · none.zig) · src/apprt.zig

children.name: termio · pty · font · input · config · os
children.detail: Terminal I/O, pty, font shaping/atlas, input/keymap, config parsing, OS shims. — path: src/termio/ · src/pty.zig · src/font/ · src/input/ · src/config/ · src/os/

children.name: libvoid C-ABI surface
children.detail: libghostty → libvoid C-ABI; old symbol names preserved where required for ABI stability. — path: src/lib/ · src/lib_vt.zig · src/main_c.zig

children.name: Roadmap — planned, NOT yet implemented
children.detail: Two further directions sit on top of grid mode but are described as roadmap, not shipped features. Captured in the .roadmap.* files at repo root.

children.name: P3 — AI-native structured I/O channel alongside PTY
children.detail: A structured agent tool-call-stream channel beside the traditional byte stream. Planned only. — path: .roadmap.ai_native_io · .roadmap.ai_native_structure

children.name: P4 — per-PR perf budget vs Ghostty baseline
children.detail: Δ-vs-ghostty perf gate on each PR. Planned only. — path: .roadmap.perf_baseline · .roadmap.upstream_diverge · .roadmap.grid

children.name: Build · packaging · CI
children.detail: zig build (VoidKit) → xcodebuild Release Void.app on macOS; GTK/flatpak/snap/nix/deb packaging; release-fork.yml CI builds + signs (ad-hoc) + ships DMG/zip to GitHub Releases with zero ghostty-org infra dependency (#23).

children.name: repo root paths
children.detail: path roots: build.zig, CMakeLists.txt, macos/Void.xcodeproj, flatpak/, snap/, nix/, pkg/, .github/

children.name: Zig build + macOS Xcode
children.detail: build.zig + build.zig.zon shared core; macos/Void.xcodeproj wraps VoidKit into Void.app. — path: build.zig · build.zig.zon · macos/Void.xcodeproj

children.name: Fork release CI
children.detail: release-fork.yml — vX.Y.Z tag → GitHub-hosted macos-26 (Xcode 26.x + zig 0.15.2) → zig build → xcodebuild Release → ad-hoc sign → DMG + universal zip → GitHub Release. release-tag.yml (unmodified Ghostty pipeline) demoted to workflow_dispatch-only. — path: .github/workflows/
